source: Extracted from agents.py _PRODUCTION_SPECS SKILL REFERENCE strings

skills.name: Source File Classification
skills.description: source file classification: filename+content signals, Chinese filename edge cases

skills.name: Device Profile Extraction
skills.description: device profile extraction: keyword+position+semantic signals for device vs procedure separation, 8-level arbitration IFU original>label>similar device>agent reasoning, iterate profile based on claim-SOTA alignment feedback

skills.name: Claim Decomposition
skills.description: claim decomposition: two modes for mature/draft IFU, primary source annotation per claim_type

skills.name: PICO Derivation
skills.description: PICO derivation: only for clinical_benefit+safety claims, generic name > brand name, population to indication subgroup

skills.name: Claim Type Source Routing
skills.description: claim_type to evidence source routing: clinical_benefit to PubMed/CT.gov, IFU_warning to RMF/GSPR, safety to clinical+PMS+vigilance

skills.name: SOTA Retrieval Strategy
skills.description: retrieval strategy: 3-tier DB config, adjust terms to DB to criteria order; search execution: use CLAIM_TYPE_SOURCE_ROUTING to skip PubMed for IFU_warning claims, select DB tier from DATABASE_TIERS by device_class

skills.name: Benchmark Construction
skills.description: benchmark construction: >=3 comparable studies+100 patients to quantitative, confidence via quantity+consistency+year+comparability

skills.name: Keyword Expansion
skills.description: keyword expansion: hypernym/hyponym/synonym/regional variants from domain_term_variants.json

skills.name: Domain Contamination Check
skills.description: retrieval domain: check forbidden terms in search results, grade severity by context, reroute if critical contamination detected; vigilance domain check: ensure vigilance results are within locked device domain, flag cross-domain events as minor unless same device category

skills.name: Literature Screening
skills.description: literature screening: title+device+indication to relevant, similar device to background only

skills.name: 6-Factor Evidence Scoring
skills.description: 6-factor scoring: F1 design 0.25, F2 relationship 0.25, F3 data quality 0.20, F4 fact confidence 0.15, F5 conflict 0.10, F6 admissibility 0.05. Upgrade/downgrade: +10/-10

skills.name: Fulltext Irreplaceability
skills.description: fulltext: irreplaceability assessment, accept abstract_only only if non-unique pivotal

skills.name: Endpoint Extraction
skills.description: endpoint extraction: abstract to Table1 to Table2 to footnotes search path, equivalence via definition+meaning+time window

skills.name: G42 Evidence Sufficiency Diagnosis
skills.description: G42 diagnosis: 13-pattern priority, endpoint substitution+keyword expansion before PMCF, spiral max 3 rounds

skills.name: Claim Evidence Matrix
skills.description: matrix: endpoint equivalence 3D framework, support_level=best_evidence ceiling+consistency

skills.name: Weighted Support Scoring
skills.description: weighted_support = SUM(score*role_weight)/SUM(role_weight), low<40 blocks MODERATE

skills.name: G42 Type-Specific Thresholds
skills.description: G42 thresholds: relative comparability not fixed numbers, RMF=unlimited brainstorm, literature=limited quality

skills.name: Endpoint Alternatives
skills.description: endpoint alternatives: query endpoint_alternatives.json, rank by clinical equivalence

skills.name: Equivalence 3D Analysis
skills.description: equivalence: 3D scoring clinical>technical>biological, XinQing mode when not claimable, performance data missing to remove clause+note reason

skills.name: Benefit-Risk Cross-Evidence Synthesis
skills.description: cross-evidence synthesis: 4-stage probability evolution predictive to experimental to empirical to real_world, benefit vs risk quality asymmetry to cannot equal-weight, G46 priority=upstream causality chain

skills.name: Summary Writing
skills.description: summary: device+evidence+uncertainty+conclusion, not evidence ID dump

skills.name: Device Description Writing
skills.description: device description: 8-field standard structure from document_structured_content, not fact_table

skills.name: SOTA Writing
skills.description: SOTA writing: benchmark to clinical meaning to device position to wording, confidence to wording map

skills.name: GSPR Analysis Writing
skills.description: GSPR analysis: 5-paragraph template per requirement, sort evidence by quality/relevance/directness

skills.name: Conclusions Writing
skills.description: conclusions: honesty without self-destruction, support_level to wording map

skills.name: Export Cleanliness
skills.description: cleanliness: 25 banned strings+22 render patterns, Annex excluded from scan; export: run final banned-pattern scan on all output files before export, quarantine files with internal control fields or template residue

skills.name: Language Constraints
skills.description: language: quantified sentence/paragraph constraints per section

skills.name: Argumentation Structure
skills.description: argumentation: GSPR grouping by clinical logic, 3 organization modes by device risk level; each paragraph must follow Problem-Evidence-Conclusion triad; transitions must use explicit logical connectors; conflicting evidence must be presented with primary and secondary streams, never suppressed

skills.name: Final QA Gate
skills.description: final QA: 30-second rejection signals=IFU-CER mismatch/SOTA missing/tables incomplete/template residue/domain contamination/evidence contradiction/over-strong conclusions; export QA: verify all output files present, check file size thresholds, verify no _backup/_FIXED files in delivery root

skills.name: Claim-SOTA Alignment
skills.description: claim-SOTA alignment: each claim checked against benchmarks to supported/partial/unsupported

v5_enrichment.note: Skills now have access to V5 defect patterns via knowledge_injector module
